name: formalizeSpec provider/model coherence — spec_provider:openai + no spec_model → model defaults to gpt-4o, NOT claude-opus-4-7 (PHASE-22 fix)
description: RED (before fix): specModel undefined → role uses default_model 'claude-opus-4-7' → mock key 'mock|claude-opus-4-7|scenario:S258' → no scripted response → schema fail → advanced:false. GREEN (after fix): specProvider='openai' + no specModel → specModel='gpt-4o' → mock key 'mock|gpt-4o|scenario:S258' → scripted response → SUCCESS → advanced_to:REVIEWER_SPEC. Mock key acts as deterministic model assertion.
